title: Meteorologist preset
description: One entry in the First Set library. Describes a single atmospheric phenomenon (cloud archetype, fog, or stub for v1.x rain/snow/lightning) as a parameter set consumed by the runtime raymarch shader.

id.description: Slug. Stable identifier referenced by Almanac rules. Lowercase + underscores only.

label.description: Human-readable name for the gallery (e.g. 'Fair-weather Cumulus').

kind.description: Phenomenon class. v1 renders cloud + fog; rain/snow/lightning are schema-stubbed for v1.x.

wmo.description: WMO classification code (e.g. 'Cu hum', 'Cb cap', 'Ci fib'). Optional but recommended for canon entries.

enabled.description: If false, runtime ignores this preset. Used for v1.x stubs (rain/snow/lightning) declared but not yet rendered.

modifiers.description: WMO accessory clouds + supplementary features layered atop the base genus by the shader. Per Open Q B: modifiers are flags on parent presets, not standalone presets.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering in Library (e.g. 'fair', 'storm', 'sunset', 'high', 'low-coverage').

params.description: Kind-dependent parameter block. See per-kind constraints below.

noiseSeed.description: Procedural seed; different values yield different cloud shapes with same other params.

octaves.description: FBM octave count. >6 expensive on phone.

coverage.description: Fraction of slab volume that contains cloud (0 = clear, 1 = overcast).

density.description: Optical thickness multiplier. 1.0 = baseline; 2.0 reads as nimbostratus.

anvil.description: Anvil-spread amount near top of slab. Cb-specific.

thickness.description: Vertical extent in meters. Real Cb can reach 12–18 km.

warpFreq.description: Domain-warp noise frequency (1/m). Small numbers — multiplied by world coords.

warpAmp.description: Domain-warp amplitude in meters. Drives cauliflower lobing.

sunScatter.description: Mie forward-scatter strength on sun-facing edges (silver lining).

ambientFloor.description: Minimum lit value in fully shadowed regions; prevents black undersides.

edgeSilver.description: Edge-feather silver-lining gain at thin density boundaries.

shadowStrength.description: Self-shadow opacity multiplier in the in-shader shadow march.

drift.description: Wind-drift response multiplier (1.0 = matches Almanac wind directly).

tint.description: Optional warm/cool fog tint as hex.

stubParams.description: Rain/snow/lightning are schema-declared in v1 but not rendered. Params are unconstrained until the v1.x SPEC for each phenomenon lands.
